title: pelargonium × rainerianum
intro: Pelargonium × rainerianum, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the geranium family, combining characteristics of Pelargonium graveolens and Pelargonium tomentosum. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, allowing it to be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include stress relief, anxiety reduction, and improved sleep quality, as well as its ability to alleviate menstrual cramps and skin irritations. Rose Geranium is commonly used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
